burst.msg_body: i784 allocated space contains padding. This is unsupported
burst.ParentFunc: bnn_top(hls::stream<hls::axis<ap_uint<16>, 0ul, 0ul, 0ul, (unsigned char)56, false>, 0>&, ap_uint<784>, ap_uint<784>*, ap_uint<256>*, ap_uint<256>*, ap_uint<1>)

burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of length 256 and bit width 1024 in loop 'L1_LOAD' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem0'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 256 and bit width 256 in loop 'L2_LOAD' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem1'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 10 and bit width 256 in loop 'L3_LOAD' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem2'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
